taskSummary: Fix first-load journal entry rendering and D1-backed analysis timeline hydration.
implementationSummary: Retired the old journal excerpts renderer that used obsolete custom entry-card markup on initial page load.
Kept journal entry rendering owned by /js/journal-tabs.js so first-load and tab-switch use the same GOV.UK summary-card renderer.
Updated Analysis timeline to read D1 journal_entries before falling back to Airtable.
Matched both project and local_project_id and tolerated the Test Project 1 legacy O/0 ID mismatch.
Extended route-state coverage for retired renderer and D1 timeline hydration.
